composition.tagline: Turn every sermon into a full week of content.
composition.cta: Edit inline, then copy or download — your content, ready to share.
composition.title: Generate your first content

beats.caption: Generate your first posts
beats.narration: Welcome back. Let's turn Sunday's sermon into a full week of content — social posts, studies, devotionals and more — in just a couple of minutes.

beats.label: Dashboard · Overview
beats.caption: Your dashboard at a glance
beats.narration: This is your ivangel dashboard. You build your request on the left, and your finished content appears on the right.

beats.label: Create · Every option
beats.caption: One panel, every option
beats.narration: This is where everything begins. First, choose what to create — social posts, a bible study, a devotional, even a podcast description. Tell ivangel whether you're working from a sermon or an upcoming event, upload your transcript, and add who was preaching. Link it to a sermon series for continuity across weeks, and include any announcements or a call to action. Need another language? Add up to three, and ivangel translates your content automatically. Finally, choose your platforms and how many posts you'd like for each.

beats.label: Create · Generating
beats.caption: Written in your church's voice
beats.narration: When you're ready, press Generate. ivangel writes everything in your church's own voice — usually in under a minute.

beats.label: Results · Social media
beats.caption: Posts for every platform
beats.narration: And there it is. Your social posts, ready for every platform — switch between Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and X, each one written to fit.

beats.label: Results · Bible study
beats.caption: A ready-made study guide
beats.narration: Your bible study guide is here too, with discussion questions drawn straight from the message.

beats.label: Results · Devotional
beats.caption: A daily devotional too
beats.narration: So is a daily devotional — a gentle, scripture-rooted reflection your community can carry through the week.

beats.caption: Your sermon, working all week
beats.narration: Edit anything inline, then copy or download as Word or PDF. That's ivangel — your sermon, working all week.
